title: Flea Treatment in Somers, NY | $350 - $650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Somers, Westchester. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for $350 - $650 treatments.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Somers home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Somers and northern Westchester County. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Somers residents for years with reliable, effective flea control solutions. Our licensed exterminators understand the unique challenges of flea infestations in Westchester County homes and use safe, EPA-approved treatments that deliver lasting results without compromising your family's safety.
localContext: From historic properties near the Elephant Hotel to modern homes around Muscoot Reservoir and Lake Lincolndale, Somers residences are susceptible to flea problems, especially in pet-friendly households. The town's suburban setting with abundant wildlife and wooded areas near Lasdon Park means fleas can easily enter homes through pets or wildlife contact, making professional treatment essential.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Somers range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a flea problem in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Somers and surrounding Westchester areas. Flea infestations require prompt attention, and our team is ready to respond quickly to eliminate these pests before they multiply further throughout your home.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use pet-safe and child-safe flea treatment products that are EPA-approved and applied by certified technicians. We'll provide specific instructions on any brief precautions needed during treatment, but our methods are designed to be safe for your entire household while effectively eliminating fleas.

faqs.question: Will one flea treatment be enough to solve my problem?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations in Somers homes require 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart to address all life stages of fleas, including eggs and pupae. We'll assess your specific situation during our inspection and recommend a treatment plan that ensures complete elimination with follow-up visits included in our service.
